settings.title: Application settings
settings.description: Change language, theme, and markdown preview activation.
global.hero.title: Personal project IDE
global.hero.description: List of projects saved locally in the browser.
global.empty.title: No projects yet
global.empty.description: Create your first project to start structuring your ideas.
project.empty.title: No project selected
project.empty.description: Go back to the list, then open a project.
project.meta.title: Title
project.stage.linkedBacklog.title: Linked backlog items
project.stage.linkedBacklog.empty: No backlog item is linked to this stage yet.
project.stage.linkedJournal.title: Linked journal entries
project.stage.linkedJournal.empty: No journal entry is linked to this stage yet.
backlog.title: Backlog
backlog.description: Ideas, improvements, and deferred items for later.
backlog.form.title: Title
journal.title: Project journal
journal.description: Notes, decisions, reports, and contextual items.
journal.form.title: Title
journal.form.titlePlaceholder: E.g. Decision about native JSON format
journal.form.contentPlaceholder: Describe the decision, note, or report
journal.form.impactPlaceholder: E.g. simplifies the MVP, postpones backend, clarifies schema...
decisions.title: Decisions
decisions.description: Condensed view of important project trade-offs.
decisions.empty.title: No structured decision
decisions.empty.description: Important decisions created from the tree will appear here.
attachments.title: Attachments
attachments.description: Reference links, notes, snippets, and file pointers.
attachments.form.title: Title
attachments.form.contentPlaceholder: Paste a short note or snippet
decisionTree.title: New idea
decisionTree.alert.titleRequired: Please provide at least a title for the idea.
decisionTree.form.ideaTitlePlaceholder: E.g. integrate a project templates system
decisionTree.form.ideaDescriptionPlaceho: Describe the idea, the context, what triggered it, what you envision...
decisionTree.questions.q1.question: Does this idea change what the project should do?
decisionTree.questions.q1.clarification: It changes objectives, scope, or the original need, not just implementation details.
decisionTree.questions.q2.question: If you ignore this idea, does the planned v1.0 still solve the original problem?
decisionTree.questions.q2.clarification: Not “would it be worse?” but “does the project remain useful and functional?”.
decisionTree.questions.q3.question: Does this idea stay in the same domain or problem as your v0.0?
decisionTree.questions.q3.clarification: Same user, same usage context, same core problem.
decisionTree.questions.q4.question: Does this idea challenge technology or architecture choices?
decisionTree.questions.q4.clarification: Library, protocol, data structure, third-party service, overall architecture, etc.
decisionTree.questions.q5.question: Are you still before the assembly phase (before v0.4)?
decisionTree.questions.q5.clarification: Main components are not yet integrated together.
decisionTree.destinations.backlog.label: Backlog v1.x
decisionTree.destinations.backlog.descri: This idea enriches the project but is not required for v1.0 to solve the original need.
decisionTree.destinations.archi.label: Architectural evaluation
decisionTree.destinations.archi.headline: This is a potential pivot to evaluate consciously.
decisionTree.destinations.archi.descript: You are still early enough to revisit the foundations. Keep an explicit trace.
decisionTree.destinations.technote.label: Post-v1.0 technical note
decisionTree.destinations.technote.headl: The idea is valid, but too late to change foundations now.
decisionTree.destinations.technote.descr: Record it as a future technical improvement and keep moving toward v1.0.
decisionTree.destinations.reframe.label: Back to v0.0
decisionTree.destinations.reframe.headli: The original need must be reframed.
decisionTree.destinations.reframe.descri: This idea shows the project no longer responds correctly to the real problem. Return to basics.
decisionTree.destinations.newproject.hea: This idea belongs to another project.
decisionTree.destinations.newproject.des: It is interesting, but it should not contaminate the current project.
pwa.offlineReady.title: Application ready offline.
pwa.offlineReady.description: The PWA cache is now active on this device.
pwa.needRefresh.title: New version available.
pwa.needRefresh.description: Reload the app to use the latest version.
